author: omerfirmak
content: <@774033563732541451>, if I wanted to do some optimizations on my guest, is there a benchmark suite with SSZ input/output that would help me with that?

author: jsign
content:
I've ready a system where I can fill tests with an external t8n like Geth --- this would allow to fill the benchmarks in EEST to also have the statelessInputBytes and statelessOutputBytes you already know from EEST tests.
I've to double check how ready is Geth reg being "spec compliant" because if isn't that much ready, it might generate wrongish values for those fields but I think for benchmark stuff there is low chance any bug could be a big deal since are mostly blocks looping executing opcodes or similar.

I've to come back to this topic soon, and ideally try to have as an output that in releases also include benchmark fillings. That would be ideal, so in releases are both tests _and_ benchmarks that everyone can use, and we keep execution-specs as single source of truth (instead of getting assisted by zkevm-benchmark-workload or external stuff).

I can ping you back whenever I've something that I try filling locally so don't get you waiting too much.
